25.reason: [The recursive call's return value is ignored when a->left is not NULL, causing the new node to be lost.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The recursive call's return value is ignored when a->left is not NULL, causing the new node to be lost.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Recursive call does not assign returned node to a->left, causing lost updates in some cases]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Recursive call does not assign returned node to a->left, causing lost updates when inserting into non-empty subtree]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The recursive call does not assign the returned node to a->left, causing lost updates when inserting into non-empty subtrees]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Recursive call does not assign the returned node to a->left, causing potential loss of subtree when inserting into non-empty left subtree]

64.reason: [Return value of put_tree is ignored for i > 0, so the tree may not be updated correctly if insertion requires modifying the root of a subtree.]
